---
crossrefs-hover: false
---

{{< include /assets/macros/macros.qmd >}}

# Solutions to Selected Exercises {.unnumbered}

## Chapter 2 - Propositional Logic

@exr-polish

{{< include /content/solutions/polish.qmd >}}

@exr-sheffer

{{< include /content/solutions/sheffer.qmd >}}

@exr-proofs-in-p

{{< include /content/solutions/proofs-in-p.qmd >}}

{{< include /content/solutions/proofs-in-p-2.qmd >}}
